<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Hotel Booking Intelligence — GitHub README</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#080c14;--bg2:#0d1220;--bg3:#111827;
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  --gold:#d4a843;--gold2:#f0c96a;--teal:#2dd4bf;--blue:#60a5fa;--red:#f87171;
  --text:#e2e8f0;--muted:#64748b;--muted2:#94a3b8;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden;}
.hero{position:relative;min-height:320px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:4rem 2rem 3rem;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(212,168,67,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(212,168,67,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:40px 40px;pointer-events:none;}
.hero-glow{position:absolute;top:-80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:600px;height:400px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(212,168,67,0.12) 0%,transparent 70%);pointer-events:none;}
.hero-tag{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,67,0.3);padding:4px 16px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:inline-block;animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease both;}
.hero h1{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,52px);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1rem;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.1s ease both;}
.hero h1 span{color:var(--gold);}
.hero-sub{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted2);max-width:560px;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.2s ease both;}
.hero-metrics{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;margin-top:2.5rem;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.3s ease both;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
.hm{text-align:center;}
.hm-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);}
.hm-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-top:2px;}
.badge-row{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.4s ease both;}
.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.04em;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid;transition:all 0.2s;}
.badge-gold{background:rgba(212,168,67,0.1);color:var(--gold2);border-color:rgba(212,168,67,0.35);}
.badge-gold:hover{background:rgba(212,168,67,0.2);}
.badge-teal{background:rgba(45,212,191,0.08);color:var(--teal);border-color:rgba(45,212,191,0.25);}
.badge-red{background:rgba(248,113,113,0.08);color:var(--red);border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.25);}
.badge-blue{background:rgba(96,165,250,0.08);color:var(--blue);border-color:rgba(96,165,250,0.2);}
.container{max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2rem 4rem;}
.section{margin-bottom:4rem;}
.sec-label{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.sec-label::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(212,168,67,0.3),transparent);}
h2{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.25rem;color:#fff;}
.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:3rem 0;}
.card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem;}
.grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;}
.grid-3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;}
.grid-5{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:0.75rem;}

/* DASHBOARD SHOWCASE */
.dash-tabs{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;}
.dash-tab{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;padding:10px 18px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;white-space:nowrap;transition:all 0.2s;background:none;border-top:none;border-left:none;border-right:none;letter-spacing:0.04em;}
.dash-tab:hover{color:var(--muted2);}
.dash-tab.active{color:var(--gold2);border-bottom-color:var(--gold);}
.dash-panels{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px;overflow:hidden;}
.dash-panel{display:none;}
.dash-panel.active{display:block;}
.dash-img-wrap{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.dash-img-wrap img{width:100%;display:block;transition:transform 0.4s ease;}
.dash-img-wrap:hover img{transform:scale(1.01);}
.dash-caption{padding:1.25rem 1.5rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;}
.dash-cap-left .dash-num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.15em;margin-bottom:4px;}
.dash-cap-left .dash-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px;}
.dash-cap-left .dash-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted2);}
.dash-cap-right{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;}
.dash-pill{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid;white-space:nowrap;}
.pill-teal{background:rgba(45,212,191,0.08);color:var(--teal);border-color:rgba(45,212,191,0.2);}
.pill-gold{background:rgba(212,168,67,0.08);color:var(--gold2);border-color:rgba(212,168,67,0.2);}
.pill-red{background:rgba(248,113,113,0.08);color:var(--red);border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.2);}
.pill-blue{background:rgba(96,165,250,0.08);color:var(--blue);border-color:rgba(96,165,250,0.2);}
.dash-nav{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:1rem;justify-content:center;}
.dash-dot{width:24px;height:3px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--border2);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;border:none;}
.dash-dot.active{background:var(--gold);width:40px;}

/* METRIC CARDS */
.metric-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:1.25rem;text-align:center;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
.metric-card:hover{border-color:rgba(212,168,67,0.3);}
.mc-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);}
.mc-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:0.03em;}
.dash-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.dash-table th{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.6rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left;}
.dash-table td{padding:1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:top;font-size:14px;}
.dash-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
.dash-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);}
.dash-num-badge{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,168,67,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,67,0.2);border-radius:3px;padding:2px 8px;display:inline-block;}
.insight-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem;transition:border-color 0.2s,transform 0.2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.insight-card:hover{border-color:rgba(212,168,67,0.3);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.insight-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
.insight-card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.insight-num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:0.15em;margin-bottom:0.75rem;}
.insight-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
.insight-body{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted2);margin-bottom:0.75rem;}
.insight-action{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--teal);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:0.75rem;margin-top:0.75rem;}
.matrix-wrap{overflow-x:auto;}
.risk-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;}
.risk-table th{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.5rem 0.75rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:right;}
.risk-table th:first-child{text-align:left;}
.risk-table td{padding:0.6rem 0.75rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);text-align:right;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted2);}
.risk-table td:first-child{text-align:left;color:var(--text);}
.risk-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;color:#fff;font-weight:500;}
.risk-high{color:#f87171!important;font-weight:600;}
.risk-med{color:#fbbf24!important;}
.risk-low{color:#34d399!important;}
.pillar{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem;}
.pillar-num{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:32px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(212,168,67,0.15);line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
.pillar-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.pillar li{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted2);list-style:none;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;}
.pillar li::before{content:'→';color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;margin-top:2px;}
.pillar li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.stack-section{margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.stack-label{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:0.6rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;}
.tag-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.stag{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid;}
.stag-gold{background:rgba(212,168,67,0.08);color:var(--gold2);border-color:rgba(212,168,67,0.25);}
.stag-teal{background:rgba(45,212,191,0.08);color:var(--teal);border-color:rgba(45,212,191,0.2);}
.stag-blue{background:rgba(96,165,250,0.08);color:var(--blue);border-color:rgba(96,165,250,0.2);}
.stag-gray{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:var(--muted2);border-color:var(--border2);}
.tree{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1.5rem;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;line-height:2;}
.tree-root{color:var(--gold2);font-weight:600;}
.tree-dir{color:var(--blue);}
.tree-file{color:var(--muted2);}
.tree-comment{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;}
.tree-line{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;}
.tree-connector{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);}
.risk-bar-wrap{margin-bottom:1rem;}
.risk-bar-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.risk-bar-bg{height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;}
.risk-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;}
.footer{text-align:center;padding:3rem 2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;}
.animate{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity 0.6s ease,transform 0.6s ease;}
.animate.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@media(max-width:700px){.grid-2,.grid-3,.grid-5{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
@media(max-width:480px){.grid-2,.grid-3,.grid-5{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-tag">HOSPITALITY ANALYTICS · POWER BI · SQL · PYTHON · ML</div>
  <h1>Hotel Booking <span>Intelligence</span><br/>& Cancellation Risk Engine</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Transforming 119K raw reservations into decision-grade revenue, retention, and cancellation risk intelligence — across City & Resort hotel properties.</p>
  <div class="hero-metrics">
    <div class="hm"><div class="hm-val">119K</div><div class="hm-lbl">Reservations</div></div>
    <div class="hm"><div class="hm-val">37.0%</div><div class="hm-lbl">Cancellation Rate</div></div>
    <div class="hm"><div class="hm-val">$101.83</div><div class="hm-lbl">Avg. ADR</div></div>
    <div class="hm"><div class="hm-val">235K</div><div class="hm-lbl">Total Guests</div></div>
    <div class="hm"><div class="hm-val">5</div><div class="hm-lbl">Dashboards</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="badge-row">
    <a href="#" class="badge badge-gold">⬡ Live Dashboard</a>
    <a href="#" class="badge badge-red">↓ Full PDF Report</a>
    <a href="#" class="badge badge-teal">⌗ SQL Queries</a>
    <a href="#" class="badge badge-blue">◈ ML Notebook</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <!-- DASHBOARD SHOWCASE -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Dashboard Showcase</div>
    <div class="dash-tabs">
      <button class="dash-tab active" onclick="switchDash(0)">01 · Performance Overview</button>
      <button class="dash-tab" onclick="switchDash(1)">02 · Cancellation Risk</button>
      <button class="dash-tab" onclick="switchDash(2)">03 · Pricing & ADR</button>
      <button class="dash-tab" onclick="switchDash(3)">04 · Guest Behavior</button>
      <button class="dash-tab" onclick="switchDash(4)">05 · Strategy</button>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-panels">
      <div class="dash-panel active" id="dp0">
        <div class="dash-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hotel Performance Overview Dashboard"/>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-caption">
          <div class="dash-cap-left">
            <div class="dash-num">DASHBOARD 01</div>
            <div class="dash-title">Hotel Performance Overview</div>
            <div class="dash-desc">119K total reservations · monthly booking trends · cancellations by market segment · global guest distribution · booking share by segment</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dash-cap-right">
            <span class="dash-pill pill-gold">119K Reservations</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-red">37% Cancel Rate</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-teal">$101.83 ADR</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dash-panel" id="dp1">
        <div class="dash-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Cancellation Risk & Loss Analysis Dashboard"/>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-caption">
          <div class="dash-cap-left">
            <div class="dash-num">DASHBOARD 02</div>
            <div class="dash-title">Cancellation Risk & Loss Analysis</div>
            <div class="dash-desc">44.2K cancelled reservations · segment-level cancellation matrix · monthly cancellation trends · predicted risk distribution · booking lead time impact</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dash-cap-right">
            <span class="dash-pill pill-red">44.2K Cancelled</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-gold">Groups 61% Risk</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-blue">104 Day Lead Time</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dash-panel" id="dp2">
        <div class="dash-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Pricing Behavior & Revenue Yield Dashboard"/>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-caption">
          <div class="dash-cap-left">
            <div class="dash-num">DASHBOARD 03</div>
            <div class="dash-title">Pricing Behavior & Revenue Yield</div>
            <div class="dash-desc">ADR distribution by hotel & booking status · customer value vs cancellation trends · monthly ADR by customer type · transient cancellation rate 40.7%</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dash-cap-right">
            <span class="dash-pill pill-teal">Resort ADR Premium</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-gold">$107 Transient ADR</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-red">40.7% Transient Cancel</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dash-panel" id="dp3">
        <div class="dash-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Guest Behavior & Acquisitions Dashboard"/>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-caption">
          <div class="dash-cap-left">
            <div class="dash-num">DASHBOARD 04</div>
            <div class="dash-title">Guest Behavior & Acquisition Insights</div>
            <div class="dash-desc">3.19 returning guests · 3.43 avg stay duration · 7,464 parking requests · booking risk by market segment · sankey acquisition flow · global distribution</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dash-cap-right">
            <span class="dash-pill pill-teal">3.43 Avg Stay</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-gold">75.1% Transient</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-blue">12.49% Upgrade Rate</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dash-panel" id="dp4">
        <div class="dash-img-wrap">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Strategic Insights & Recommendations Dashboard"/>
        </div>
        <div class="dash-caption">
          <div class="dash-cap-left">
            <div class="dash-num">DASHBOARD 05</div>
            <div class="dash-title">Strategic Insights & Recommendations</div>
            <div class="dash-desc">6 data-driven findings · 3 strategic action pillars · recommendations for cancellation reduction, revenue growth, and guest retention improvement</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dash-cap-right">
            <span class="dash-pill pill-gold">6 Insights</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-teal">3 Action Pillars</span>
            <span class="dash-pill pill-blue">City + Resort</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-nav">
      <button class="dash-dot active" id="dot0" onclick="switchDash(0)"></button>
      <button class="dash-dot" id="dot1" onclick="switchDash(1)"></button>
      <button class="dash-dot" id="dot2" onclick="switchDash(2)"></button>
      <button class="dash-dot" id="dot3" onclick="switchDash(3)"></button>
      <button class="dash-dot" id="dot4" onclick="switchDash(4)"></button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI METRICS -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Core KPI Snapshot</div>
    <div class="grid-5">
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">119K</div><div class="mc-lbl">Total Reservations</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val" style="color:#f87171">37.0%</div><div class="mc-lbl">Cancellation Rate</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">$101.83</div><div class="mc-lbl">Average ADR</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">235K</div><div class="mc-lbl">Total Guests</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">104</div><div class="mc-lbl">Avg Lead Time (days)</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val" style="color:#f87171">3.2%</div><div class="mc-lbl">Repeat Guest Rate</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">7,464</div><div class="mc-lbl">Parking Requests</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">3.43</div><div class="mc-lbl">Avg Stay (nights)</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val" style="color:#2dd4bf">12.49%</div><div class="mc-lbl">Room Upgrade Rate</div></div>
      <div class="metric-card"><div class="mc-val">14.5%</div><div class="mc-lbl">Returning Guest Cancel.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- INSIGHTS -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Critical Findings</div>
    <div class="grid-2" style="gap:1rem">
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 01</div><div class="insight-title">OTA Dependency Risk</div><div class="insight-body">Online TA drove the highest booking volume but also the highest cancellation rate at 36.7%, creating structural revenue instability.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Prepaid OTA offers · Stricter cancellation policies · Direct booking campaigns</div></div>
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 02</div><div class="insight-title">Peak Season Yield Gap</div><div class="insight-body">Booking volume and ADR peaked July–August with ADR reaching $160 in Room Type C — untapped yield management opportunity.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Dynamic pricing · Operational surge readiness</div></div>
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 03</div><div class="insight-title">Unmonetized Parking Demand</div><div class="insight-body">Parking demand remained consistently high across all booking segments, reflecting strong guest dependence on private transportation.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Premium reserved parking · Capacity management system</div></div>
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 04</div><div class="insight-title">Resort Premium Pricing Power</div><div class="insight-body">Resort Hotel achieved a higher ADR than City Hotel, reflecting stronger premium pricing power and higher guest spending behavior.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Luxury packages · Seasonal upsells · Experience bundles</div></div>
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 05</div><div class="insight-title">Transient Segment Dominance</div><div class="insight-body">Transient customers contributed 75.1% of all bookings — the dominant revenue driver — yet loyalty investment remains minimal.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Loyalty tiers · Personalized offers · Direct booking incentives</div></div>
      <div class="insight-card"><div class="insight-num">INSIGHT 06</div><div class="insight-title">Groups = Highest Risk Segment</div><div class="insight-body">Groups segment showed a 61% cancellation rate — the single highest-risk segment causing massive revenue block leakage.</div><div class="insight-action">→ Deposit requirements · Contract enforcement · Risk scoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RISK MATRIX -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Cancellation Risk Matrix</div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:0">
      <div class="matrix-wrap">
        <table class="risk-table">
          <thead><tr><th style="text-align:left">Segment</th><th>Contract</th><th>Group</th><th>Transient</th><th>Trans-Party</th><th>Total</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr><td>Aviation</td><td>—</td><td class="risk-low">0.00%</td><td>21.10%</td><td>35.29%</td><td>21.94%</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Complementary</td><td class="risk-low">0.00%</td><td class="risk-low">0.00%</td><td>13.23%</td><td>12.50%</td><td class="risk-low">13.06%</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Corporate</td><td>18.18%</td><td>17.24%</td><td>18.29%</td><td>19.72%</td><td>18.73%</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Direct</td><td>14.29%</td><td>13.43%</td><td>15.54%</td><td>13.55%</td><td class="risk-low">15.34%</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Groups</td><td class="risk-high">95.92% ⚠</td><td class="risk-low">0.00%</td><td class="risk-high">95.69% ⚠</td><td>31.30%</td><td class="risk-high">61.06% ⚠</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Offline TA/TO</td><td>9.19%</td><td>11.85%</td><td class="risk-med">42.63%</td><td>26.15%</td><td class="risk-med">34.32%</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Online TA</td><td>25.84%</td><td>6.15%</td><td class="risk-med">38.80%</td><td>12.52%</td><td class="risk-med">36.72% ⚠</td></tr>
            <tr style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03)"><td><strong>TOTAL</strong></td><td><strong>30.96%</strong></td><td><strong>10.23%</strong></td><td class="risk-med"><strong>40.75%</strong></td><td><strong>25.43%</strong></td><td class="risk-med"><strong>37.04%</strong></td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ML MODEL -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">ML Model — Predicted Cancellation Risk</div>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div class="card">
        <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted2);line-height:2.2">
          <div><span style="color:var(--muted);display:inline-block;width:80px">Model</span><span style="color:var(--gold2)">Logistic Regression + Random Forest</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--muted);display:inline-block;width:80px">Target</span><span>booking_status (Cancel / Confirm)</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--muted);display:inline-block;width:80px">Features</span><span>lead_time · market_segment · adr</span></div>
          <div><span style="display:inline-block;width:80px"></span><span>deposit_type · customer_type</span></div>
          <div><span style="color:var(--muted);display:inline-block;width:80px">Key Driver</span><span style="color:var(--teal)">lead_time × market_segment</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="risk-bar-wrap"><div class="risk-bar-label"><span style="color:#34d399">Low Risk</span><span style="color:#34d399;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px">60.3% — 72,000 bookings</span></div><div class="risk-bar-bg"><div class="risk-bar-fill" style="width:60.3%;background:#34d399;"></div></div></div>
        <div class="risk-bar-wrap"><div class="risk-bar-label"><span style="color:#fbbf24">Medium Risk</span><span style="color:#fbbf24;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px">28.2% — 33,600 bookings</span></div><div class="risk-bar-bg"><div class="risk-bar-fill" style="width:28.2%;background:#fbbf24;"></div></div></div>
        <div class="risk-bar-wrap"><div class="risk-bar-label"><span style="color:#f87171">High Risk</span><span style="color:#f87171;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px">11.5% — 13,700 bookings</span></div><div class="risk-bar-bg"><div class="risk-bar-fill" style="width:11.5%;background:#f87171;"></div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PILLARS -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Strategic Action Pillars</div>
    <div class="grid-3">
      <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-num">01</div><div class="pillar-title">Reduce Cancellation Losses</div><ul><li>Predictive risk flags at booking time</li><li>OTA deposit mandates</li><li>Lead time cancellation policies</li><li>Group contract enforcement</li><li>Advance payment triggers</li></ul></div>
      <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-num">02</div><div class="pillar-title">Grow Revenue & ADR</div><ul><li>Dynamic peak-season pricing</li><li>Resort luxury bundles</li><li>Yield management system</li><li>Room type upsell automation</li><li>Premium parking monetization</li></ul></div>
      <div class="pillar"><div class="pillar-num">03</div><div class="pillar-title">Retain Guests Directly</div><ul><li>Personalized loyalty tiers</li><li>Transient direct booking offers</li><li>Member-exclusive rates</li><li>Website & mobile UX optimization</li><li>Exclusive member discounts</li></ul></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STACK -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Technology Stack</div>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div>
        <div class="stack-section"><div class="stack-label">Data & Querying</div><div class="tag-row"><span class="stag stag-teal">SQL</span><span class="stag stag-teal">PostgreSQL</span><span class="stag stag-teal">DAX</span><span class="stag stag-teal">Power Query (M)</span></div></div>
        <div class="stack-section"><div class="stack-label">Visualization & BI</div><div class="tag-row"><span class="stag stag-gold">Power BI</span><span class="stag stag-gold">Power BI Service</span><span class="stag stag-gold">Drillthrough</span><span class="stag stag-gold">Custom Tooltips</span></div></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stack-section"><div class="stack-label">Analytics & ML</div><div class="tag-row"><span class="stag stag-blue">Python 3.10+</span><span class="stag stag-blue">Pandas</span><span class="stag stag-blue">Scikit-learn</span><span class="stag stag-blue">Jupyter</span></div></div>
        <div class="stack-section"><div class="stack-label">Delivery</div><div class="tag-row"><span class="stag stag-gray">PDF Report</span><span class="stag stag-gray">Live Dashboard</span><span class="stag stag-gray">GitHub</span><span class="stag stag-gray">Executive Summary</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- REPO TREE -->
  <div class="section animate">
    <div class="sec-label">Repository Structure</div>
    <div class="tree">
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-root">📦 hotel-booking-intelligence/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">📂 data/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">raw/</span> <span class="tree-comment">→ original hotel booking dataset</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;└──</span> <span class="tree-dir">cleaned/</span> <span class="tree-comment">→ processed, feature-engineered dataset</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">📂 sql/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">01_cancellation_analysis.sql</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">02_adr_by_segment.sql</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">03_monthly_trends.sql</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;└──</span> <span class="tree-file">04_guest_behavior.sql</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">📂 python/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">01_eda_exploration.ipynb</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">02_feature_engineering.ipynb</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;└──</span> <span class="tree-file">03_cancellation_ml_model.ipynb</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">📂 powerbi/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">hotel_performance_overview.pbix</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">cancellation_risk_analysis.pbix</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">pricing_revenue_yield.pbix</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;└──</span> <span class="tree-file">guest_behavior_acquisition.pbix</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">├──</span> <span class="tree-dir">📂 report/</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;├──</span> <span class="tree-file">hotel_intelligence_full_report.pdf</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;└──</span> <span class="tree-file">executive_summary.pdf</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">│</span></div>
      <div class="tree-line"><span class="tree-connector">└──</span> <span class="tree-file">📜 README.md</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="footer">
  <p style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:16px;color:#e2e8f0">Built for decision-grade analytics — not just dashboards.</p>
  <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:0.5rem;">Hotel Booking Intelligence & Cancellation Risk Engine</p>
</div>

<script>
function switchDash(n) {
  for(let i=0;i<5;i++) {
    document.getElementById('dp'+i).classList.toggle('active', i===n);
    document.getElementById('dot'+i).classList.toggle('active', i===n);
    document.querySelectorAll('.dash-tab')[i].classList.toggle('active', i===n);
  }
}
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, {threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.animate').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
